description: Account Router Missing Procedures & Update Fix. (1) Update procedure silently drops revenue/employees/industry/parentAccountId fields accepted by schema (B-08). (2) accountListResponseSchema uses 'data' key but router returns 'accounts' — mismatch (B-09). (3) No updateRevenue procedure — domain Account.updateRevenue() unreachable via API (B-10). (4) No updateEmployeeCount procedure (B-11). (5) No categorizeIndustry procedure (B-12). (6) mapAccountToResponse returns raw WebsiteUrl value object instead of string (B-13). Audit: docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md section 12.

wiring_complete.target: All schema fields persist on update; 3 new procedures functional
wiring_complete.actual: revenue/employees/industry persist via account.update (atomic); 3 new tRPC procedures (updateRevenue/updateEmployeeCount/categorizeIndustry) functional with dedicated error mapping + audit logging; B-09 schema key + B-13 website serialization fixed.

test_coverage.actual: Every changed line covered by new/updated tests; pre-ship diff-coverage (Sonar new_coverage >=80%) PASS; domain 2723 / application 1394 / validators 2369 / api 6159 green.

status_history.note: Exec session start (STOA workflow Phase 3) — feat/ifc-270 worktree
All 4 validations + 6 gates PASS; codex-review PASS; attestation written

notes: Account domain wiring audit finding (B-08..B-13). See docs/audit/account-detail-wiring-audit.md section 12 and .specify/sprints/sprint-18/attestations/IFC-270/attestation.json. Out-of-scope adapter finding (revenue 0 -> null) tracked: debt-ledger REVENUE-ZERO-PERSIST-001 + gh issue #406.
